1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'luft' appears 2 times

id="luft"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Nyheter

https://www.finansnorge.no/artikler/
Avvik: 202 | Bestått: 225
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://finanswatch.no/nyheter/bank/article18977942.ece" target="_blank">Feil premisser gir feil politikk</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (194 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=1055&content.link=410989&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

<button class="block-filter-content__expandbutton" data-filters-expanded="false" role="button"> <span class="block-filter-content__expandbutton-more">Vis flere (21)</span> <span class="block-filter-co
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Om Finans Norge

https://www.finansnorge.no/om-finans-norge/
Avvik: 183 | Bestått: 201
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5>Politisk gjennomslagskraft</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>European Banking Federation (EBF)</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/Recycle-Bin/forsikringsdrift/forsikringsdrift/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Finans Norge Forsikringsdrift</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.ebf.eu/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">https://www.ebf.eu/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (159 avvik)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'luft' appears 2 times

id="luft"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Inkassokonferansen 2026

https://www.finansnorge.no/arrangementer/2026/inkassokonferansen-2026/
Avvik: 177 | Bestått: 168
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Om programmet</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h5> </h5>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a class="btn btn--primary event-info__signup" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/inkassokonferansen-2026/register" target="_blank"> Meld deg på her!
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=1318&content.link=735578&content.category=2052,2056,2294,2301&content.type.category=2064&

Kompetanse

https://www.finansnorge.no/bransjer/arbeidsliv/kompetanse/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 151
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Finansnæringens kompetansegap</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/bransjer/arbeidsliv/kompetanse/hvorfor-bedriftenes-kompetansebehov-er-viktig/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcs
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=35&content.link=476528&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arrangementer

https://www.finansnorge.no/arrangementer/
Avvik: 193 | Bestått: 199
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (183 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=1083&content.link=410991&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Bankkonkurransen i Norge

https://www.finansnorge.no/bransjer/bank/bankkonkurransen-i-norge/
Avvik: 175 | Bestått: 160
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="page-section__heading"> Hard bankkonkurranse gir deg bedre betingelser </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/statistikk-og-analyse/bank/konkurransen-i-det-norske-bankmarkedet/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/g
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/statistikk-og-analyse/bank/aktive-bankkunder/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware-
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (166 avvik)

iframe is missing title attribute

Arrangementer

https://www.finansnorge.no/arrangementer/?c=finansnorge-arbliv
Avvik: 193 | Bestått: 175
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (183 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Inkasso

https://www.finansnorge.no/bransjer/inkasso/
Avvik: 193 | Bestått: 220
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/2/eddy-kjar-2.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/2/eddy-kjar-2.jpg
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/eddy-kjar-12.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/eddy-kjar-12.j
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/eddy-kjar-22.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/eddy-kjar-22
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Inkassokonferansen 2026</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5>Inkasso bidrar til at det økonomiske systemet fungerer godt</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'luft' appears 2 times

id="luft"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Få tilgang til medlemsinnhold og nyhetsbrev

https://www.finansnorge.no/tilgang-til-lukket-medlemsinnhold/
Avvik: 172 | Bestått: 166
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Tilgang til lukket innhold på nettsidene</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://arbinn.nho.no/kontakt-oss/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">chat</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=33&content.link=456167&content.category=&content.type.category=2268&content.tags=" st
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Digitalisering

https://www.finansnorge.no/tema/digitalisering/
Avvik: 191 | Bestått: 220
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/0011627537ca4e95bc9e723fa184df92/untitled-1-5.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/0011627537c
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/9beb43e24db84474b9ba73ede5fa26e8/untitled-2-4.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/9beb43e24db
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/1000_kroner_bakside_2.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/1000_
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'luft' appears 3 times

id="luft"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (159 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=35&content.link=448619&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" aria-label="Video av Finans Norges administrerende direktør som forteller om

Politikk

https://www.finansnorge.no/tema/politikk/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 188
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/9beb43e24db84474b9ba73ede5fa26e8/untitled-2-4.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/9beb43e24db
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/10052380743_1c4e29b9b0_b.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/10
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/dfb5db3293c542cc99c1041ba4a31336/untitled-1-5.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/dfb5db3293c
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/02/finanstilsynet-risiko-i-en-ny-tid/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/9beb43e24db84474b9ba73ede5fa26e8/untitled-2
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/02/onsker-en-helhetlig-vurdering-av-bankenes-rammevilkar/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/10052380
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/01/finanslunsj-med-nikolai-astrup/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/dfb5db3293c542cc99c1041ba4a31336/untitled-1-5.
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (101 characters)

<a aria-label="Les mer om Norge bør innta en proaktiv rolle i EUs pågående arbeid med kapitalreguleringen av bankene" href="/dokumenter/aktuelle-brev/2026/norge-bor-innta-en-proaktiv-rolle-i-eus-pagae
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/politikk/statsbudsjettet/handlingsregelen/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware--fi
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (160 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=35&content.link=448623&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arrangementer

https://www.finansnorge.no/arrangementer/?c=finansnorge-politikk
Avvik: 193 | Bestått: 175
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (183 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=1083&content.link=410991&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arrangementer

https://www.finansnorge.no/arrangementer/?c=finansnorge-ink
Avvik: 193 | Bestått: 178
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="mailto:event@finansnorge.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-circle-down"></i> </div> <div class="block-entranc

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (183 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=1083&content.link=410991&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Aldri før har sykkeltyveriene kostet mer

https://www.finansnorge.no/artikler/2026/02/aldri-for-har-sykkeltyveriene-kostet-mer/
Avvik: 172 | Bestått: 157
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Slik ungår du sykkeltyveri:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=33&content.link=744791&content.category=2058,2304&content.type.category=2047&content.
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

SERIOUS

Personvernerklæring

https://www.finansnorge.no/personvernerklaring/
Avvik: 170 | Bestått: 158
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=33&content.link=412668&content.category=&content.type.category=2048&content.tags=" st
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/a88009c6eac14bfca4c6fb609746cdb7/img_2963-3.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/a88009c6eac14

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Forventningsbarometeret

https://www.finansnorge.no/tema/statistikk-og-analyse/forventningsbarometeret/
Avvik: 177 | Bestått: 160
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/11/adobestock_540606900.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/11/ado
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/41731b4e0b7f424c972e4ee27854809f/adobe_boriskphotos_v2.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/4
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/5/adobestock_insidecreativehouse_449882847.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/f
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Politisk sprik i Forventningsbarometerets siste kvartal</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-megaphone"></i> Tidligere pressemeldinger om Forventningsbarometeret:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/artikler/2025/102/politisk-sprik-i-forventningsbarometerets-siste-kvartal/" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/102/politisk-sprik-i-forventningsbarometerets-siste-kvartal/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/11/adob
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/08/stor-tro-pa-egen-okonomi--men-fortsatt-usikre-pa-landets/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/41731b4e0b7f424c972e
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/05/toll-trump-og-usikkerhet-barberer-forventningene/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/5/adobestock_in
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/statistikk-og-analyse/forventningsbarometeret/metode/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/globalassets/f
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/tema/statistikk-og-analyse/forventningsbarometeret/metode/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (160 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=35&content.link=467546&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Slik setter bankene boliglånsrenten

https://www.finansnorge.no/tema/personlig-okonomi/slik-setter-bankene-boliglansrenten/
Avvik: 176 | Bestått: 165
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/tema/personlig-okonomi/okonomi--og-gjeldsradgivning/" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (322 characters)

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Finansportalen</span> <span class="block-links-item-text">Sjekk renten i din bank! Finansportalen.n
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Finansportalen</span> <span class="block-links-item-text">Sjekk renten i din bank! Finansportalen.n
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

<a href="https://www.ssb.no/bank-og-finansmarked/finansinstitusjoner-og-andre-finansielle-foretak/statistikk/renter-i-banker-og-kredittforetak" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-tit
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (166 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=33&content.link=472633&content.category=&content.type.category=2060&content.tags=" st
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" aria-label="Video som viser hvordan styringsrenten settes." data-cookieconse
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/Finance.Nor
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/Medlemsfordeler/medlemsfordeler-nho/nho-kurs/" target="_blank"> <span>Se NHOs tilbud</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'luft' appears 3 times

id="luft"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (160 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-P8T4PS&content.type.id=35&content.link=448609&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://finansnorge.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://finansnorge.no --max-pages 21 --format html
